title: Morning Shield
when: After Fajr, as the day begins
desc: Begin the day fortified — forgiveness sought, protection asked, blessings sent.

title: Evening Calm
when: After Asr, before the light fades
desc: Close the day in remembrance — dominion handed back, the night entered protected.

title: Relief in Distress
when: Any moment of fear, grief, or overwhelm
desc: A sequence for moments that press close — the call from darkness, then trust, then steadiness.

title: Before Something Hard
when: Before an interview, exam, or hard conversation
desc: Steady the heart before you begin — ease asked, the tongue loosened, blessings sent.

title: Daily Affairs
when: Once a day — a sustained sitting of remembrance
desc: A long sequence carried daily — salutations on the Prophet ﷺ braided through Quranic chapters and istighfār, with single recitations marking the passage between them.

title: Daily Istighfār
when: Once a day — a hundred times turning back to Him
desc: The Prophet ﷺ said he sought Allah's forgiveness more than seventy times each day. A simple daily return — said with attention, the heart softened by repetition.

title: Daily Durood
when: Once a day — a hundred salutations on the Prophet ﷺ
desc: A daily current of love and blessing sent to the Messenger ﷺ. "Whoever sends one blessing upon me, Allah sends ten blessings upon him." (Sahih Muslim 408)
